name: Beer Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup nonfat dry milk powder, instant
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar and yeast in warm beer in a large bowl.
2. Let stand for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in 2 1/4 cups flour and the next six ingredients to form a soft dough.
4. Knead about 8 minutes, adding additional flour as necessary.
5. Divide dough into two portions and shape each into a 6-inch round loaf.
6. Place loaves 4 inches apart on a large baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
7. Brush tops with egg white and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
8. Make 1/8-inch deep cuts in a lattice design across the tops of the loaves.
9. Cover and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour and 15 minutes.
10. Bake at 375°F for 15 minutes or until loaves sound hollow when tapped.
